'''Parjai Squad''' was an elite unit of [[Clone paratrooper/Legends|clone paratroopers]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] under the command of [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Barlex]].

The [[Squad/Legends|squad]] was part of the [[2nd Airborne Company/Legends|2nd Airborne Company]], itself a unit of the [[7th Sky Corps/Legends|7th Sky Corps's]] [[212th Attack Battalion/Legends|212th Attack Battalion]], led by [[Clone Marshal Commander/Legends|Clone Marshal Commander]] [[Cody/Legends|CC-2224]] and [[High Jedi General/Legends|High Jedi General]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]].

Parjai Squad was one of the first [[Squad/Legends|squads]] to land in the [[Battle of Utapau/Legends|Battle of Utapau]] and later aided in the subjugation of [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]] following the transmission of [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]]. The [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] of Parjai Squad wore specialized armor and helmets that allowed for high altitude drops.

The squad's name, ''parjai'', meant "victory" in [[Mando'a/Legends|Mando'a]].
